candidates.why: Clear SG&A-type operating overhead component.

Operational statistic, not expense.

variables.notes: R:c. No single explicit SG&A subtotal is shown. Selected best overhead buckets/components while excluding COGS and D&A. Included semantically strong SG&A rows even if preview values are empty, per instructions.

candidates.why: Net finance-expense style total, but components exist so it is less preferred.
Best recurring interest-expense line; preferred core XINT mapping.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities

Recurring finance-cost component and excludes FX if used instead of Financial Expense total.

candidates.why: Good semantic match, but no visible values in preview.

candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure of lease interest; likely duplicative of the main lease-interest row.
Balance sheet liability, not period expense.

variables.notes: Used granular recurring finance-cost rows and excluded FX-related rows. Avoided Financial Expense total because components are available, and avoided lease-interest rows to reduce double-count risk with Interest expenses.

candidates.why: Income statement attribution line, not balance sheet equity stock.
Not shareholders' equity.

candidates.row_label: Reserve for invested unrestricted equity fund
candidates.why: Equity component only, not total book equity.

Shareholder count, not equity amount.

variables.notes: No parent/owners-only equity line is visible on the balance sheet, so Total Equity is used for BE. Consistent with this, MIB is set to empty to avoid double counting.
